title: SuperSXO Score — Self-Assessment Diagnostic
meta_description: The SuperSXO Score is a free diagnostic that identifies where your search-to-action journey breaks down. No rankings promised. No conversion guarantees.
canonical_intent: Deliver the primary trust-building entry into the commercial funnel. Free diagnostic that demonstrates the framework in practice and leads naturally toward the paid audit.
summary: The SuperSXO Score is a free self-assessment that scores a digital asset's performance across the seven search-to-action journey layers. It demonstrates the SXO framework in diagnostic practice without making unsupported performance promises.

required_sections.name: diagnostic_introduction
required_sections.purpose: Introduce the SuperSXO Score as a diagnostic instrument, not a marketing tool. Frame it as a governance check against the SXO framework layers.

required_sections.name: what_the_score_measures
required_sections.purpose: Explain the seven dimensions assessed. Each dimension must map to a journey layer defined in /sxo-framework/.

required_sections.name: score_methodology
required_sections.purpose: Explain how the score is derived. Must be defensible and transparent. No black-box framing.

required_sections.name: score_limitations
required_sections.purpose: Clearly state what the score does not guarantee. No ranking promises. No conversion promises.

required_sections.name: next_step_bridge
required_sections.purpose: Lead users from their score result toward the SXO Audit for deeper professional diagnosis.

blocked_claims: The SuperSXO Score guarantees higher rankings.
Improving your score guarantees more conversions.
A high score means your site is perfectly optimized.
The score is the only SXO diagnostic that matters.
editorial_notes: This page must balance commercial purpose with diagnostic authority. The score must feel like a professional instrument, not a lead magnet. Monetization is allowed but must reinforce trust. No fake urgency. No countdown timers. No aggressive lead capture. The transition to /sxo-audit/ must feel like a natural clinical recommendation, not a sales push.
publication_blockers: Score logic must be defined, documented, and defensible.
Route status must be 'published' in data/routes.json.
Monetization gate must pass before any commercial element is deployed.
All internal links must resolve to published routes.
